ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web Client, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was created */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user being replied to (if any) */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the status being replied to (if any) */,
  "retweeted_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the retweeted status (if any) */,
  "retweeted_status_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the retweeted status (if any) */,
  "retweeted_status_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user who posted the retweeted status (if any) */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (original, retweet, reply) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "is_conversation_thread" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is part of a conversation thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends (following) the user has */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "header_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's header image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Twitter Web Client, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the source (web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mentioned_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the URL */,
  "url_text" TEXT /* Shortened URL text */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "social_media_strategy" TEXT /* Social media strategy of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client running the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "related_tweets" TEXT /* Related tweets for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the influencer */,
  "influence_score" TEXT /* Influence score of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "engagement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Engagement score of the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (likes, retweets, replies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "related_tweets" TEXT /* Related tweets for the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "thread_id" TEXT /* ID of the thread being analyzed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_participants_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)
